objective: Close the current Orin NX stage by synchronizing control-plane and interview-facing materials around measured results, without opening new algorithm or dataflow experiments.

entry_context.latest_device_dataflow_result: format-matched NvBuffer pair preserves the resid_r15_s07 quality anchor on five Regular clips and gives a small Regular05 device-stage gain
entry_context.current_blocker: No current stabilization-strength or NvBuffer-pair correctness blocker.
entry_context.recommended_next_after_closeout: Only open a new dataflow contract if it uses the same source, same matrix, same crop/postprocess, and same 25fps/180f review boundary.

allowed: resid_r15_s07 is the accepted Regular gate stabilization-strength recovery candidate
NvBuffer pair is a quality-preserving device-side dataflow alternative with small measured stage gains
VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp has module-level speed and perf-per-watt evidence at high resolution
Regular gate and challenge/diagnostic sets have separate claim roles
forbidden: claiming all-scene or product-grade EIS quality
using inclusion_source_to_dest or safe103_crop98 as the current stabilization-strength baseline
reviving limiter, R-radius, LP-weight, residual-strength, safe103, or inclusion sweeps for the closed quality issue
treating outdoor-car inverse/post_geometry results as Regular05 EIS-quality evidence
